app.subtitle: A digital museum of Chinese machines
app.pageTitle: Mechanica — A digital museum of Chinese machines
app.metaDescription: Revisit Chinese mechanical history through sourced data, 3D structure, and interactive simulation.
app.loadError: This exhibit could not be loaded
app.versionPublished: A new version was published — reload to continue.

home.title: Set ancient machines in motion
home.intro: Revisit Chinese mechanical history through sourced data, 3D structure, and interactive simulation.

viewer.rotateHint: Drag a gold part to drive the machine
viewer.schemeDiff: Parts that differ between schemes are highlighted in gold.
viewer.demoInProgress: A demo is already in progress.
viewer.contextLost: The graphics context was lost — trying to recover…

assembly.title: Reassemble: drag parts onto the gold slots
assembly.hintMoveCloser: Move the part closer to its target slot

compare.moveBack: Both models move back one step

inspector.title: Part record
inspector.empty: Select a part in the model to inspect its name, dimensions, and sources.
inspector.noControversies: No controversy is linked to this part's sources.
inspector.noAncient: No direct ancient measurement survives for this part; its metric geometry is a reconstruction parameter.
inspector.noPartQuote: No direct part-level quotation survives; use the machine evidence register for the reconstruction context.

gallery.title: Images and sources
gallery.empty: No items are available in this gallery layer.
gallery.reconstructionDescription: Project screenshots and generated reconstruction renders.
gallery.museumDescription: Downloaded museum photographs with source attribution.
gallery.collectionDescription: Museum collection records and related text links.
gallery.authorUnavailable: Author not supplied in the exhibit data
gallery.imageUnavailable: The local image is unavailable; use the source link below.
gallery.deadLink: If this page is offline or has moved, search the museum collection for the exhibit title shown above.
gallery.linkUnavailable: No stable collection URL is available. Search the named museum for this exhibit.

docent.title: Ask the docent
docent.placeholder: Ask how this machine works or what the sources say…
docent.thinking: The docent is reviewing the exhibit…
docent.controversyQuestion: How does the collection frame the “{{topic}}” controversy?
docent.fallbackSchemes: How do the reconstruction schemes for {{machine}} compare?
docent.fallbackSources: Which collection sources support each controversy or scheme?
docent.mockDepth: {{principle}} For depth, open the machine evidence register for quotes and dimensions. [来源:{{cite}}]
docent.mockDevelopment: This development response is grounded in the current machine record. [来源:{{cite}}]

events.fallback: The mechanism enters its next working state

astroclock.caption_reservoir: The header reservoir feeds the water circuit
astroclock.caption_constant-head: The constant-level tank steadies the flow
astroclock.caption_fill: The scoop fills and overcomes the fork
astroclock.caption_open: The iron tooth opens the tongue
astroclock.caption_relock: The locks catch the next scoop
astroclock.caption_return: The water-lift returns the spent water
astroclock.caption_tier-report: The wheel crosses a mark — the jacks raise their placards
astroclock.caption_drag-coach: Drag the gold ring along the rim to drive the scoop wheel

seismoscope.caption_quake-report: The {{bearing}} dragon drops its ball into the toad — bearing recorded
seismoscope.caption_quake-reset-hint: Press “Reset all eight directions” to try another bearing
seismoscope.caption_scheme-switch: Switched to the Feng Rui 2005 pendulum scheme for this demo
seismoscope.releaseBall: One dragon releases its ball toward the matching toad · Book of Later Han
seismoscope.locked: The other seven directional paths remain locked · Book of Later Han

labels.beat-up_advance: The beater packs the new weft
labels.camera: The view centers on the mechanism
labels.camera_focus: The view follows the active station
labels.chime: The upper figure strikes the chime
labels.cycle_ready: The loom returns to its ready position
labels.drive_slow: The drive approaches the trip point
labels.drum: The lower figure strikes the drum
labels.pattern_contrast: The second program produces a different weave
labels.phase_start: The mechanism returns to its start state
labels.program_active: The first stored program is active
labels.pulse: A directional pulse reaches the detector
labels.transmission_advance: Motion passes to the next stage
labels.treadle_press: The treadle bank enters the program
labels.weft_insert: The shuttle crosses the open shed
